metadata.regulatory_mandate: Factories Act Section 88 / OISD standards evidence preservation
metadata.description: Sealed SCADA telemetry and risk factors recording for safety investigation.

factors.name: Confined Space Operations
factors.details: Active Confined Space entry. Requires continuous atmospheric monitoring.

factors.name: Active Maintenance Activity
factors.details: Zone is undergoing active equipment maintenance. Transient conditions and bypassed safety systems may exist.

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: CO Rapid Accumulation Anomaly
factors.details: TEMPORAL HAZARD: Carbon Monoxide is rising rapidly at 4.24 ppm/s. Indication of a process gas leak.

factors.name: Confined Space Operations
factors.details: Active Confined Space entry. Requires continuous atmospheric monitoring.

factors.name: Active Maintenance Activity
factors.details: Zone is undergoing active equipment maintenance. Transient conditions and bypassed safety systems may exist.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.

factors.name: Asphyxiation Risk (Oxygen Deficiency)
factors.details: ASPHYXIATION HAZARD: Oxygen level is critical at 18.2% (below 19.5% standard threshold, Factories Act Sec 36).

factors.name: Confined Space Compound Risk
factors.details: CRITICAL: Active Confined Space permit overlapping with abnormal gas readings. Poor ventilation in confined spaces creates lethal hazard traps (Factories Act 1948 Section 36 compliance breach).
